traceability_rows.trace_rule: approved element subject hash is the upstream canonical element boundary
traceability_rows.test_obligation: candidate-check with review decision must pass

traceability_rows.trace_rule: reuse_scope may consume only included projection ids or approved message ids
traceability_rows.test_obligation: projection-excluded ids are rejected from reuse_scope

traceability_rows.trace_rule: P3-SPEC-CLOSURE review hash is directly bound before every approved message is used for presentation coverage
traceability_rows.test_obligation: candidate-check with P3-SPEC-CLOSURE review decision passes and missing or unknown message_ref is rejected

traceability_rows.trace_rule: reuse requires semantic role, data, operation, state, hierarchy, interaction, constraint, scope, and trace evidence
equivalent semantic_intent, trigger_condition, scope, and lifecycle use one mode unless exception exists
traceability_rows.test_obligation: different modes without exception are rejected

traceability_rows.trace_rule: sustained or decision-critical information remains recoverable and discoverable
traceability_rows.test_obligation: unrecoverable TOAST-only sustained information is rejected

traceability_rows.trace_rule: pattern rows may constrain semantics but cannot decide carrier-specific layout behavior
traceability_rows.test_obligation: layout-placement terms in P3-SPEC-PATTERNS are rejected

traceability_rows.trace_rule: layout consumes pattern ids and presentation ids, then owns carrier, containment, ordering, width, height, and z-axis rules
patterns cannot add product capability or new elements
traceability_rows.test_obligation: new element or capability refs are routed to product gap review outside this workpack
